name: Major Disaster Tobacco Tax Refund

eligibility.description: Available to persons holding tobacco products for sale at the time of a disaster. Claim must be filed within 6 months of the disaster determination and the claimant must not have been indemnified by insurance for the tax amount.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The Secretary shall pay an amount equal to the internal revenue taxes and customs duties paid on tobacco products lost, rendered unmarketable, or condemned due to a Presidentially declared major disaster.
